Motion To Seal Portions Of Decl. Of Jeffrey M. Theodore Iso Btig, Llc'S Supplemental Opposition To Stonex Group Inc. And Stonex Financial Inc.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BTIG, LLC's Motion To Seal Portions Of Decl. Of Jeffrey M. Theodore Iso Btig, Llc'S Supplemental Opposition To Stonex Group Inc. And Stonex Financial Inc.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation.

Denied without prejudice. It is unlikely that every word on the two exhibits the subject of this motion must be redacted from the public file; but the items were apparently not provided to the court to allow the court to evaluate that issue.

Any new motion on the subject of sealing these items must be noticed before Judge Karnow in Dept. 611 on a date chosen after consulting with the clerk for Dept. 611. The new motion must either explain why every single word in the exhibits must be redacted, or propose a more restricted sealing. The items themselves should be lodged with Dept. 611 for in camera inspection. To save time and if the motion is not opposed, it may be filed as an ex parte motion.

Counsel for the movant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
